text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And so it begins—this year's Spring Fan Fest!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's neck-and-neck in the Tracen marathon! Who will be first to the
academy gates and past the finish line?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone. Our next cheer is "Fight on!" Let's support the racers
with our best cheering voices! Ready, and—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Fight on!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First place is in! Followed closely by the pack! And with that, the last
racer is firmly past the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hehe! King, thank you for your support! I actually finished! Your cheers helped me keep running!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't only me cheering. All the fans here cheered for you to make
it across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Congrats! You did it!
What an inspiring feat!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Huh? ...Hehe, you're right. I didn't realize I had so many people
cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Well, you do. Let that sink in. Now... Cheer Squad, assemble! We're
moving on to the next competition!

text_block_list.name: Nature and Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this year's Fan Fest is a blast as always! Even the people cheering
look like they're having lots of fun.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to join! ♪ I can sense you've got cheer spirit! Feel
free to shout out anytime!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Uh, uhh... B-but... I don't know the chants or anything...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry! I'll teach you the chants, and you can just follow along!
Let's enjoy ourselves! ♪ C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Pearl and Spectator
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tracen! Tracen! Go!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, even the cheers sound exciting! Maybe I'll try shouting
something!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Please do! I'll give you some lyric cards if you like, so have fun
cheering with us right up till the end!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: This year's Fan Fest seems to have loud cheers everywhere you go.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: I know, right? It's got me joining in too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(...Everyone watching has a twinkle in their eyes. Wow... King's done a
great job with the Cheer Squad!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King, I promise...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I will see this race through to the end! No matter how hard it gets... I'll
be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will give the fans a race to go wild about!

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! All participants of the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt
obstacle race, we have an important update to share!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This afternoon, there'll be a lot of events going on at the same time.
There's the cycling race by the school gates, and the quiz run in the
gym...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I think we'll have no choice but to split up. Can I leave the cycling
race with you and Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay. So you'll be at the gym? After that, we have the 4,000-meter
scavenger hunt obstacle race, so let's meet at the track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Kiiing! I picked up some lost property for the Cheer Squad as I was
patrolling around!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-sorry! We've been rushing around all day...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you could do with some deep breaths! That's what I did
last year. I was told to calm down and take deep breaths!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Nature, we should start heading over soon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. Well, we'll be off, then!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, good luck! All right, everyone. Time to split up! Let's go to our
respective events and cheer with the fans!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for lending your wisdom! I hope you'll be watching over us
as we cheer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yup! Heh, look at you, getting more dependable!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Captain! I found this lost property while I was doing my
rounds!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...They really have been rushing around, huh. Guess I'll take a little
detour. Hm?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Go, Tracen! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Gahhh, this is so embarrassing! But our captain trusted me with this,
so I have to at least try and see it through properly!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, between races, don't forget to hydrate and refuel with
some sugar! We don't want anyone to faint.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
This is an announcement from the Fan Fest Committee. Concerning
the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt obstacle race scheduled for 1:30
p.m...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Isn't that...
